body.value: Dual Wall? Single Wall? Polished, black or blue? We have a style of tip for every father out there

Does the father in your life own a 6.7 Powerstroke? Then this is a no-brainer. The factory fuel filter is a ticking time bomb, waiting for the most inconvenient time to go off. Our Fuel Filter Conversion Kit makes sure this doesn't happen.
Improve the efficiency and Capacity of your engine's fuel filtration system with our Cat Fuel Filter Adapter Kit. Everything you need to upgrade to an ultra-fine 2 micron fuel filter.
These ready to go, easy install kits, offer the extra protection trucks need. Our Coolant FIltration Systems help filter out harmfull debris such as casting sands and metal shavings.
Fathers are hard to shop for, we get it. That is why we also offer a gift card for those who more difficult to shop for fathers.
